Meta.description: Bespoke cakes, cupcakes, cake pops & cookies for weddings, birthdays and special occasions – handcrafted with love in Karlsruhe.

Hero.title: Sweet memories,
Hero.subtitle: Bespoke cakes, cupcakes & cookies for your most beautiful moments. Each creation as unique as the occasion itself.

Featured.title: Latest creations
Featured.subtitle: Straight from Instagram – freshly inspired every week.

Categories.title: What may we bake?
Categories.subtitle: From wedding cakes to cake pops – we bring your ideas to life.

About.title: Baked with heart, hands and dedication.
About.story: What started as a passion for my family has grown into a small atelier in Karlsruhe. Every cake that leaves my workshop tells a story – your story. I work with carefully selected ingredients, plenty of attention to detail, and the firm belief that every occasion deserves a unique piece.

values.handmadeDesc: Every creation is made one at a time.
values.freshDesc: Baked fresh on the day of your event.

Gallery.title: Our Gallery
Gallery.subtitle: Every cake is one of a kind – inspired by you, crafted by us.

Order.title: Request a cake
Order.subtitle: Tell us about your occasion – we'll respond within 24 hours with a quote.

fields.flavorPlaceholder: e.g. chocolate with raspberry filling, vegan, gluten-free...
fields.inspirationHint: Show us your vision – up to 3 images, 5 MB each.
fields.name: Your name
fields.addressHint: Leave empty for pickup in Karlsruhe.
fields.consent: I agree to the processing of my data according to GDPR.

success.title: Thank you!
success.body: Your request has been received. Randa will get back to you within 24 hours.

error.title: Something went wrong.
error.body: Please try again or contact us directly via WhatsApp.
error.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again in an hour.

validation.date: Please choose a valid date (at least 7 days from now).
validation.guests: Please enter a number of guests (1-500).
validation.flavor: Please describe your wishes (at least 10 characters).
validation.name: Please enter your name.
validation.consent: Please agree to the privacy policy.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: We look forward to your message.
Contact.addressNote: Exact address on request – we bake from a private workshop.

Prices.title: Prices & FAQ
Prices.subtitle: Transparent guide prices – every offer is created individually.
Prices.note: All prices are guide values. Elaborate decorations, special wishes or allergen-friendly options may affect the price.

faq.q: How far in advance should I order?
faq.a: At least 7 days – for wedding cakes 4–8 weeks, as we only accept a limited number per weekend.
Yes, within Karlsruhe and the surrounding area for a small fee. Otherwise pickup is also possible.

faq.q: Do you make vegan or gluten-free cakes?
faq.a: Of course. Please indicate your wishes and any allergies directly in the order form.
50% deposit on order confirmation, the rest on pickup or delivery – by bank transfer or cash.

faq.q: Can I send my own inspiration images?
faq.a: Absolutely! In the order form you can upload up to 3 inspiration images.
